upstream_tests.command_scope: all targets without default udpgw feature

rejection_reasons: released ipstack uses unbounded admission, per-flow packet, per-flow data, session-removal, and device-egress channels
no global flow or accept-queue maximum is exposed by ipstack configuration
tun2proxy inherits the core blocker and adds proxy, DNS, platform, and setup code outside the intended final boundary
known_gaps: functional matrix intentionally stopped after the mandatory bounded-resource preflight failed
